title: POST /books endpoint implemented
evidence: src/main.rs:45-82 create_book handler; tested in test_create_and_get_book and test_create_book_validation

title: GET /books with author filter support
evidence: src/main.rs:84-125 list_books handler with ListQuery; tested in test_list_and_filter_books

title: GET /books/{id} endpoint
evidence: src/main.rs:127-151 get_book handler; tested in test_create_and_get_book and test_not_found

title: PUT /books/{id} update endpoint
evidence: src/main.rs:153-218 update_book handler; tested in test_update_book

title: DELETE /books/{id} endpoint
evidence: src/main.rs:220-233 delete_book handler; tested in test_delete_book

title: Input validation for title and author
evidence: src/main.rs:49-62 (create) and 188-195 (update) validate required fields; tested in test_create_book_validation

title: Health check endpoint
evidence: src/main.rs:41-43 health handler; tested in test_health_check

title: SQLite database storage
evidence: Cargo.toml:8 rusqlite dependency; src/main.rs:235-246 init_db creates books table

title: JSON responses with appropriate HTTP status codes
evidence: All handlers use HttpResponse with 201 Created, 200 OK, 204 No Content, 400 Bad Request, 404 Not Found

title: README.md with setup and run instructions
evidence: README.md present with build, run, and test commands

title: At least 3 unit/integration tests
evidence: 7 integration tests in src/main.rs:286-482 (test_health_check, test_create_and_get_book, test_create_book_validation, test_list_and_filter_books, test_update_book, test_delete_book, test_not_found)
